title: Zoom-in and zoom-out as real context operators
description: The demonstrator must move down to evidence and back up to perspective using explicit context operators.
query: Show the concrete evidence and the higher-level perspective for the final public rename strategy.

need_proposal.reason: Need one concrete fact and one high-level summary.

conclusions.content: The demonstrator can navigate between detailed evidence and high-level perspective.

llm.answer: The concrete evidence is that only cima_demo remains as the active public identity, and the higher-level perspective is that the public surface stays coherent while migration risk remains bounded. [S1] [P1]

documents.title: Concrete rename decision
documents.text: The detailed evidence is that only cima_demo remains as the active package and public identity.

documents.title: Higher-level perspective
documents.text: The broader perspective is that the public surface becomes coherent while migration risk remains bounded.

citems.content: Only cima_demo remains as the active public identity after the cleanup.
The broader objective is a coherent public surface with bounded migration risk.

summaries.content: The cleanup leaves a single coherent public surface while preserving bounded migration risk.
